resources.name: Cloudflare R2 (free tier)
resources.what: S3-compatible object storage with a free tier (10GB/mo) and no egress fees. Needs your own free Cloudflare account.
resources.blurb: real object storage, free to start, no egress tax. your account, honestly.

resources.name: 0x0.st (the null pointer)
resources.what: No-account file/paste hosting — POST a file, get a URL back. Open, but rate-limited; be kind.
resources.blurb: drop a file, get a link, no signup. a true commons — so don't abuse it.
